overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a foggy, snow-covered mountain settlement with sci-fi floating rocks overhead. The camera smoothly pans across industrial shacks and snow-laden rooftops while a character in red observes the misty valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain settlement with industrial shacks

agents.ego_description: character in red coat standing on snow-covered rooftop surveying the foggy settlement and floating rocks overhead

entered.detail: tall black metal communication tower with crossbar structures
steep metal roof covered in thick snow with icicles hanging from edges
steep rocky cliff face forming the valley wall
large floating tectonic rocks suspended in the foggy sky above the settlement
small weathered wooden structure with snow-covered roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy mountain settlement with snow-laden industrial rooftops. A metal antenna tower stands prominently in the center while a character in red observes from a rooftop on the right. Floating rocks hover in the misty sky above the valley as the camera slowly pans left, revealing wooden shacks built into the mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with bioluminescent glow below

events.description: blue bioluminescent glow becomes visible in the valley below the settlement

agents.ego_description: character remains stationary on rooftop, now looking down toward the glowing valley floor

entered.detail: eerie blue light emanating from the valley floor between buildings
rusted metal pipes and conduits running between structures
tall thin towers visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, a mysterious blue bioluminescent glow reveals itself in the valley below. The metal antenna tower and mountain cliff exit the frame while industrial pipes and distant towers come into view. The character remains visible on the right, silhouetted against the fog as the settlement's depth becomes apparent.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep settlement valley with clustered rooftops

events.description: character in red exits frame as camera moves past their position

agents.ego_description: character no longer visible as camera continues past their position to reveal more of the settlement

entered.detail: dense cluster of overlapping snow-covered roofs and industrial platforms
faint silhouettes of buildings against the far mountain wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the character's position, revealing a dense cluster of snow-covered rooftops extending deeper into the valley. The blue glow remains visible in the center while floating rocks shift to the left side of the frame. The settlement appears to continue far into the foggy distance with industrial structures dotting the mountainside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a foggy mountain settlement that gradually reveals the industrial depth and mysterious bioluminescence of a hidden valley. It begins on snow-laden rooftops where a character in red stands beside a prominent metal antenna tower, with floating rocks hovering in the misty sky above. As the camera continues its sweep, the antenna and cliffs exit the frame to uncover a mysterious blue bioluminescent glow emanating from the valley below, flanked by industrial pipes and distant towers. The scene then expands past the silhouetted character to reveal a dense cluster of snow-covered rooftops extending deep into the distance. Finally, the view settles on a vast expanse of industrial structures dotting the mountainside, with the floating rocks shifting toward the edge of the frame as the settlement vanishes into the fog.
